player_notes.james harden: Harden was heavily targeted by Brunson in Game 1, exploited on defense repeatedly; confidence in his assist/points props down given matchup vulnerability and potential scheme adjustments by CLE in Game 2.
player_notes.jalen brunson: Dropped 38 pts in Game 1 OT win, torching Harden all night; strong points and assists prop confidence heading into Game 2.
player_notes.dylan harper: Exited Game 2 with right hamstring injury and is set for MRI; availability for Game 3 is uncertain — monitor status closely before betting any props.
player_notes.jalen williams: Left Game 2 with left hamstring tightness and did not return; MRI pending — likely questionable or out for Game 3, significantly impacting OKC's wing rotation and prop slate.
player_notes.de'aaron fox: Missed Game 2 with right high ankle sprain (second consecutive absence); status for Game 3 unclear — if out again, major boost to Wembanyama usage and teammates' prop ceilings.

game_notes.OKC vs SAS: De'Aaron Fox (ankle) out Game 2 and status uncertain for Game 3; Dylan Harper (hamstring, MRI) and Jalen Williams (hamstring, MRI) both injured — significant rotation uncertainty for both teams in Game 3.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: Playoff Injury Landscape does not list Fox as out for R2; SAS vs POR series diary notes Fox contributing across the series (21/3/9 in G5 clincher).
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Today's news confirms Fox (ankle) was OUT for Game 2 of the Western Conference Finals vs OKC ('Spurs starting guard De'Aaron Fox is sitting out his second consecutive game Wednesday night against the Thunder because of a right high ankle sprain'), meaning he missed at least G1 and G2 of the WCF.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Add Fox to the Active With Documented Concerns section: right high ankle sprain, OUT for WCF G1 and G2 at minimum. Flag as a primary injury concern for G3 and beyond. Note that Stephen A. Smith commentary ('Spurs need De'Aaron Fox to win the West') confirms his absence is viewed as series-defining.

suggested_context_updates.conflict: Today's news reports: 'Dylan Harper suffered a right hamstring injury during the Spurs' loss to the Thunder in Game 2 of the Western Conference finals' and he is 'set for MRI.' This is a new, untracked injury with unknown severity.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Add Harper to the Active With Documented Concerns section immediately: right hamstring injury suffered in WCF G2, MRI pending. Flag as a primary availability concern for G3. Do not assume any baseline minutes or role until MRI results are known. His emergence as a key SAS secondary scorer (27/10/3 in R1 G3) makes his status highly consequential.

The PHX series diary (G2) notes Williams listed questionable with left hamstring. No confirmed return or new injury is tracked beyond the R1 context.

This is a recurrence or continuation of his R1 hamstring issue, now confirmed as an active injury in the WCF with MRI pending.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update Jalen Williams' status in the Playoff Injury Landscape: left hamstring tightness caused G2 WCF exit, MRI pending. Flag as OUT or severely limited for G3 until MRI results are known. The context doc's R1 note anticipated this risk but did not confirm the injury persisted into the WCF — update to reflect confirmed WCF G2 exit.
